forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 assignees:
 - claude-code
 position_column: done
-position_ordinal: ffffffffffffffffffffffa980
+position_ordinal: ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffef80
 title: Add tests for async send/read_jsonrpc_message error paths
 ---
 daemon.rs:540, 554, 556-558, 561-562, 566, 579, 585, 589-590, 596-598, 608-611

Coverage: 74.6% (153/205 lines)

Functions:
1. `graceful_shutdown()` — wait() Err path, no-stdin branch
2. `send_jsonrpc_message()` — header/body/flush errors
3. `read_jsonrpc_message()` — read_line I/O error, EOF, parse errors

#coverage-gap

=== RESOLUTION ===
Added 10 tests covering:
- test_send_jsonrpc_body_write_failure: PartialWriter (accepts exactly header.len() bytes) triggers the `write body` error arm
- test_send_jsonrpc_flush_failure: FlushFailingWriter (accepts writes, fails on poll_flush) triggers the `flush` error arm
- test_send_jsonrpc_produces_exact_wire_format: locks the header + body wire format
- test_send_jsonrpc_serializes_nested_values: happy-path round-trip with unicode/nested/null values
- test_read_jsonrpc_read_line_io_error: FailingReader (ConnectionReset on every read) triggers `read header line: {e}` error arm (distinct from EOF)
- test_read_jsonrpc_read_exact_io_error: HeaderOkBodyFailReader (good header bytes, UnexpectedEof on subsequent reads) triggers `read body: {e}` arm
- test_read_jsonrpc_eof_after_first_header: headers loop second-iteration EOF (first header ok, no blank-line terminator)
- test_read_jsonrpc_content_length_with_no_space_after_colon: strip_prefix path with no leading space
- test_graceful_shutdown_with_no_stdin_still_waits: covers the `child.stdin.as_mut() == None` branch
- test_graceful_shutdown_normal_flow_with_cat: full happy-path through graceful_shutdown (send shutdown/exit, read response, wait)

SKIPPED GAP:
- graceful_shutdown wait() Err → ShutdownFailed (line 540): tokio Child::wait only fails if the OS wait syscall errors or the child handle was invalidated. Not triggerable without refactoring production code to accept a trait-bounded child handle.
\ No newline at end of file
